basic_details.job_title: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital has released the official Junior Resident Notification 2026. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 40 years of age with an MBBS degree from a recognized University/ Institution and a valid Delhi Medical Council (DMC) Registration Certificate can attend the walkin interview on 22 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates (belonging to Delhi only).

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution and must possess valid Registration Certificate from DMC
qualification.details: MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution. Must possess a valid Registration Certificate from DMC.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56100 Per Month (as per 7th CPC level 10 plus allowances).

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Fitness

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.deep_chand_bandhu_hospital: MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution and must possess valid Registration Certificate from DMC

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution. Must possess a valid Registration Certificate from DMC.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST and 3 years for OBC candidates (belonging to Delhi only).

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 56100 Per Month (as per 7th CPC level 10 plus allowances).

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in Interview Document Verification Medical Fitness

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Junior Resident posts at Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident posts at Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is scheduled for 22nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized University/Institution and hold a valid Registration Certificate from the Delhi Medical Council (DMC).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the Junior Resident post at Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 56100 per month, as per the 7th CPC level 10 plus allowances.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Junior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any age relaxations applicable for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided: 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates who are residents of Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview, followed by Document Verification, and a Medical Fitness assessment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies (ID proof, educational certificates, DMC registration, etc.), and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital located?
faq.answer: Deep Chand Bandhu Hospital is located in Delhi, with the pincode 110052. The exact venue address for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.
